channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🌍 BRICS Foreign Ministers Fail to Agree on Joint Statement Over Iran War
item.description: Top diplomats from BRICS nations including rivals Iran and UAE could not issue a joint statement after a two-day meeting in Delhi, exposing deep divisions within the bloc over the ongoing Iran conflict. India released only a chair's statement instead.

item.title: 🇨🇩 Ebola Outbreak Confirmed in Congo with 65 Deaths
item.description: Africa CDC confirmed a new Ebola outbreak in Democratic Republic of Congo's Ituri province with 65 deaths out of 246 suspected cases. The outbreak is in a remote region and US health officials are monitoring the situation.

item.title: 🇱🇧🇮🇱 Israel and Lebanon Extend Ceasefire by 45 Days
item.description: Israel and Lebanon agreed to extend their ceasefire by 45 days after US-mediated talks in Washington, despite continued Israeli strikes. The extension allows time for further negotiations toward a permanent political settlement.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Oscar-Winning Iranian Director Condemns War Deaths and Crackdown
item.description: Asghar Farhadi, director of the first Iranian film to win an Oscar for best foreign language movie, described as deeply painful the deaths of thousands in a January crackdown on protesters and the ongoing Iran war.

item.title: 🇨🇺 US Justice Department Prepares to Indict Former Cuban President Raul Castro
item.description: The US Justice Department is preparing to indict former Cuban President Raul Castro over alleged human rights abuses, raising fears of forced regime change among Cuban officials.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Trump Suggests Deadly Russian Strike on Kyiv Could Set Back Ukraine Peace Efforts
item.description: US President Donald Trump suggested that a deadly Russian missile strike on a Kyiv apartment building that killed 24 people could complicate peace negotiations between Russia and Ukraine.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Trump Weighs Taiwan Arms Package After Summit Aimed at Steadying US-China Ties
item.description: Taiwan thanked the US for support ahead of further talks between Trump and Xi, as the US president weighs a new arms package for the island after the Beijing summit.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Doubles Down on Manufacturing Push After Trump Visit
item.description: China's top party journal emphasized continued focus on manufacturing after Trump's visit, signaling no major policy shifts despite trade discussions.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Faces Critical Shortage of Accredited Language Schools for Foreign Workers
item.description: Foreign workers in Japan are struggling with a shortage of accredited language schools, creating barriers to integration and employment.

item.title: ⚔️ US Army Trains to Counter Drone Swarms as Battlefield Threat Evolves
item.description: US soldiers are training to counter drone swarms as the military adapts to evolving battlefield threats from unmanned aerial systems.

item.title: 🇺🇸 FBI Offers $200K Reward for Ex-Air Force Specialist Who Defected to Iran
item.description: The FBI is offering a $200,000 reward for information leading to the arrest of Monica Witt, a former US Air Force intelligence specialist who defected to Iran and is accused of espionage.

item.title: 🇺🇦 UN Vehicle Struck Twice by Drones in Ukraine's Kherson Region
item.description: The UN expressed alarm after one of its humanitarian vehicles was struck twice by drones in Ukraine's Kherson region, highlighting dangers facing aid workers.

item.title: ✈️ China Agrees to Buy 200 Boeing Jets, Could Rise to 750
item.description: President Trump announced China agreed to purchase 200 Boeing aircraft, with potential for the deal to expand to 750 jets, as part of trade discussions following the Beijing summit.

item.title: 🇩🇪 German Chancellor Merz Reports Good Call With Trump After Iran Spat
item.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz reported a constructive call with Trump following tensions over Germany's stance on the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🌾 US Expects Double-Digit Billions in Chinese Farm Purchases After Summit
item.description: The US expects China to make double-digit billions in agricultural purchases following the Trump-Xi summit, part of trade deal discussions.

item.title: ⛏️ China Still Slow on Rare Earth Approvals Despite Improvements
item.description: China remains slow on rare earth export approvals despite some improvements, continuing to drag its feet on critical mineral exports.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Trump Leaves Beijing With Few Wins But Warm Words for Xi
item.description: US President Donald Trump left China with no major breakthroughs on trade or tangible help from Beijing to end the Iran war, despite two days spent heaping praise on his host, Xi Jinping.

item.title: 🇺🇬 Uganda Confirms Ebola Outbreak
item.description: Uganda's health ministry confirmed an Ebola virus disease outbreak, adding to regional health concerns.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US CDC Monitoring Ebola Outbreaks in DRC and Uganda
item.description: The US CDC is monitoring Ebola outbreaks in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda and providing assistance to regional health authorities.

item.title: 🇨🇩 New Ebola Outbreak Confirmed in Congo with 65 Deaths
item.description: A new Ebola outbreak has been confirmed in Congo with 65 deaths out of 246 suspected cases, Africa's top public health body announced.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Planning New Offensive from Belarus, Zelensky Warns
item.description: Ukraine's intelligence documents show Russian plans for missile and drone strikes targeting Ukraine's presidential and command facilities, with Zelensky warning of potential attacks from Belarus.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russian Drone Force Passes 100,000 Personnel, Copying Ukraine Model
item.description: Russia's expanding drone forces have passed 100,000 personnel, copying Ukraine's example in drone warfare, according to Magyar.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE Rejects Iranian Accusations of War Involvement
item.description: The UAE rejected attempts to justify terrorist attacks after Iran accused Abu Dhabi of playing a role in the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump Says Patience With Iran Running Thin
item.description: President Trump said he won't be much more patient with Iran as tensions continue over the Iran conflict and nuclear negotiations.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Trump Discussed Lifting Sanctions on Chinese Companies Buying Iranian Oil
item.description: Trump spoke with Xi about potentially lifting sanctions on Chinese companies that buy Iranian oil as part of broader negotiations.
